name: Chris Tucker
bio: Christopher Tucker is an American stand-up comedian and actor who emerged in the early 1990s as a frequent performer on HBOs Def Comedy Jam, known for his high-pitched delivery and rapid, animated style. He gained film recognition in Friday (1995) and international fame as Detective James Carter in the Rush Hour series. After a long hiatus from stand-up, he returned with the 2015 Netflix special Chris Tucker Live.

timeline.ev: Debuts as a stand-up on HBOs Def Comedy Jam
Gains recognition in the film Friday
Co-stars in The Fifth Element and Money Talks
Stars as James Carter in Rush Hour
Releases the Netflix special Chris Tucker Live

accolades: Frequent featured performer on Def Comedy Jam
MTV Movie Award for Best On-Screen Duo for Rush Hour

bits.t: Impersonates Bill Clinton and Barack Obama

bits.yt_title: Chris Tucker Impersonates Bill Clinton And Barack Obama | Netflix Is A Joke
